notes: Phase 3 (Mount Hyjal & Black Temple, Tier 6) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Restoration Druid Healer gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (both raid tiers are already fully documented regardless of the TBC Anniversary realm's current progress). Icy Veins lists identical gear for Phase 3 and Phase 4 for this spec — Zul'Aman apparently offered no BiS upgrades over Black Temple/Hyjal Tier 6 gear for this role. Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

gems.name: Insightful Earthstorm Diamond — or Bracing Earthstorm Diamond (personal preference: mana regen vs raw healing)
Quick Lionseye (+4 spell healing / +4 haste) — occasional pick near a haste breakpoint, also unlocks the meta
Purified Shadowsong Amethyst (+4 spell healing / +6 spirit) — unlocks Insightful Earthstorm Diamond
